blended.narrative: Sugarloaf is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,477 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

Thursday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
